prompt: A 4x3 photo collage of 12 cinematic, nostalgic snapshots of a young Japanese couple in everyday life, shot like candid film photography with soft blur, muted colors, grain, bloom, and shallow depth of field. The overall mood is intimate, wistful, urban, and slightly melancholic, with a warm-and-cool mixed color palette and natural imperfect composition. Include 12 distinct photos: 1) a close nighttime portrait on a city street, one person in a scarf, face partially obscured, surrounded by glowing bokeh lights; 2) the couple sitting closely together on a train at night, leaning on each other, quiet and sleepy; 3) a rear three-quarter view of one person walking alone on a city street at night with traffic lights and storefront bokeh; 4) a rooftop or elevated outdoor portrait at dusk or early morning, one person turning back toward camera with windblown hair and a jacket; 5) a bright daytime suburban street snapshot with one person standing near a hedge, casual and slightly overexposed; 6) a very close, dimly lit selfie-like frame of the couple together indoors or at night, both faces soft and out of focus; 7) the couple seated side by side on a beach watching the sunset over the ocean, seen from behind; 8) the couple talking across a small table inside a cozy izakaya or retro restaurant with posters and warm tungsten lighting; 9) a cramped candid indoor or transit photo with one person slumped or resting, heavy motion blur and dark green tones; 10) the couple standing face to face in a narrow alley at night, surrounded by lantern light and vertical Japanese signs; 11) a quiet cropped detail shot of intertwined hands and draped clothing while sitting outdoors beside pavement; 12) a night portrait with one person against a background of tall city buildings and colorful defocused lights. Keep all 12 images borderless in a seamless grid, with slight variation in framing and exposure, as if taken over many dates and ordinary moments. Use moody 35mm film, early 20s, Tokyo, autumn, and romantic nostalgia.
